hero.imageAlt: Premium architectural shingle roof on a modern home
hero.headline: Next Level Roofs.

intro.label: We are Elite Roofing
intro.body: We're a modern roofing company. Our premium installation process transforms any home into an energy-efficient, weather-ready fortress — architectural shingles, metal, and slate, all backed by a 30-year transferable warranty.

configuratorTeaser.headline: Find out how much a new roof costs.
configuratorTeaser.body: Get an instant estimate based on your home's square footage, pitch, and material preference.

zPatternRows.label: Premium Materials
zPatternRows.headline: The right material for every roof.
zPatternRows.body: From architectural shingles to standing-seam metal and natural slate. We install what lasts — matched to your home's style, climate, and budget.

zPatternRows.label: Certified Crews
zPatternRows.headline: Factory-trained, insured, guaranteed.
zPatternRows.body: Every crew is certified by the manufacturers whose materials we install — GAF Master Elite, Owens Corning Platinum Preferred. Workmanship warranty stays with your home if you sell.

footerCta.headline: Configure your roof.
footerCta.subhead: Get in touch for an initial consultation and estimate.
